input.title: Initial analysis
input.description: Analyse the target thoroughly and produce initial findings with supporting evidence. Share findings with critic and synthesizer via peer messages.

input.title: Challenge findings
input.description: Review the advocate's initial analysis. Identify weaknesses, logical gaps, alternative explanations, and missing evidence. Send challenges to the advocate and final assessment to the synthesizer.

input.title: Produce consensus report
input.description: Synthesise the advocate's findings and the critic's challenges into a balanced final report with confidence levels, resolved/unresolved points, and open questions.
